title: Connections and Automations
excerpt: I am trying to create an automation that will create a new item on a separate workspace. The items have a couple of fields that are connections/mirrored is it possible to create automations to another workspace with thes…

posts.author: lbern (Logan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create an automation that will create a new item on a separate workspace. The items have a couple of fields that are connections/mirrored is it possible to create automations to another workspace with these?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely! Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?
